title: RF elements TPA-SMA TwistPort adaptor with 2x RSMA connectors
description: TPA-SMA is a TwistPort converter adapter from TwistPort to (2) RSMA-female connectors. The adapter allows connect any two-polarized radio to be connected by RF cables. The adapter is capable of operating in the 5180 to 6400MHz band TPA-SMA provides industry most used RP-SMA male coaxial interface in dual linear H+V polarization RP-SMA connectors are placed directly on waveguide, avoiding use of inner coaxial cables and minimizing loss to necessary minimum
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,8 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors TwistPort, (2) RSMA female Physical characteristics Shielding Yes Mounting On the antenna Purpose Outdoor Material Aluminum, UV stabilized ABS plastic Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 60 Weight [g] 210 Width [mm] 90 Height [mm] 90 Depth [mm] 134
